overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character in a green jacket walking through a foggy, decrepit urban courtyard. The environment features brick apartment buildings, scattered debris, and thick atmospheric fog limiting visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley between brick apartment buildings

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously along the fog-shrouded brick wall of an apartment building

entered.detail: tall brick apartment building with weathered facade and fire escape ladders
metal pipe railing running along the left side of the path
wet asphalt ground with scattered leaves and debris
metal fire escape attached to the brick building

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow foggy alley pressed against a red brick apartment building. Metal railings line the left side while the building's fire escapes and windows loom through the mist. The ground is wet asphalt scattered with debris.

scene_state.functional_zone: open courtyard with scattered furniture and debris

events.description: exits narrow alley into open courtyard area with visible debris and furniture

agents.ego_description: walking through the debris-filled courtyard past overturned lounge chairs and broken umbrellas

entered.detail: overturned white striped lounge chairs scattered in the courtyard
large beige patio umbrella standing among the debris
pile of broken wood and rubble in the center of the path

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wider courtyard filled with fog and debris. White lounge chairs and a beige patio umbrella lie scattered and overturned among rubble. The character navigates through the wreckage as apartment buildings loom in the background through the mist.

events.description: approaching ornate iron gate covered in thick vines and vegetation

agents.ego_description: approaching the ornate iron gate entrance covered in overgrown ivy

entered.detail: tall black wrought iron gate with decorative scrollwork, partially covered in vines
weathered wooden slatted bench sitting beside the path
thick green vines covering the gate and adjacent brick walls
red brick pillar supporting the iron gate structure

segments.scene_description: The character approaches an ornate wrought iron gate entrance flanked by brick pillars and covered in thick overgrown ivy. A weathered wooden bench sits to the right. The gate looms ahead through the dense fog, marking a transition point in the decrepit urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic urban alley that gradually opens into a desolate, debris-strewn courtyard. It begins with the character walking along a narrow path of wet asphalt pressed against a red brick apartment building, where fire escapes and metal railings loom through a thick mist. As the path widens, the scene expands into a larger courtyard filled with rubble, featuring overturned white lounge chairs and a beige patio umbrella scattered across the ground. The camera then tracks the character through this wreckage toward a transition point in the environment, moving past a weathered wooden bench. Finally, the movement culminates at an ornate wrought iron gate flanked by brick pillars and draped in thick, overgrown ivy.
